'''ât-ch-ch-w''' ('''katachewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:albify|albify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-ch-ch-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:albify|albify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-ch-ch-w
|-
! Lemma
| katachewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitachewoko|thitachewoko]] || [[word:jitachewoko|jitachewoko]] || [[word:shitachewoko|shitachewoko]] || [[word:kitachewoko|kitachewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutachewoko|thuthutachewoko]] || [[word:jujutachewoko|jujutachewoko]] || [[word:shushutachewoko|shushutachewoko]] || [[word:kukutachewoko|kukutachewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutachewoko|thutachewoko]] || [[word:jutachewoko|jutachewoko]] || [[word:shutachewoko|shutachewoko]] || [[word:kutachewoko|kutachewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutachewoko|thutachewoko]] || [[word:jutachewoko|jutachewoko]] || [[word:shutachewoko|shutachewoko]] || [[word:kutachewoko|kutachewoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotachewoko|thothotachewoko]] || [[word:jojotachewoko|jojotachewoko]] || [[word:shoshotachewoko|shoshotachewoko]] || [[word:kokotachewoko|kokotachewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotachewoko|thotachewoko]] || [[word:jotachewoko|jotachewoko]] || [[word:shotachewoko|shotachewoko]] || [[word:kotachewoko|kotachewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotachewoko|thotachewoko]] || [[word:jotachewoko|jotachewoko]] || [[word:shotachewoko|shotachewoko]] || [[word:kotachewoko|kotachewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtachewoko|thĂŠtachewoko]] || [[word:jĂŠtachewoko|jĂŠtachewoko]] || [[word:shĂŠtachewoko|shĂŠtachewoko]] || [[word:kĂŠtachewoko|kĂŠtachewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatachewoko|thathatachewoko]] || [[word:jajatachewoko|jajatachewoko]] || [[word:shashatachewoko|shashatachewoko]] || [[word:kakatachewoko|kakatachewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatachewoko|thatachewoko]] || [[word:jatachewoko|jatachewoko]] || [[word:shatachewoko|shatachewoko]] || [[word:katachewoko|katachewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatachewoko|thatachewoko]] || [[word:jatachewoko|jatachewoko]] || [[word:shatachewoko|shatachewoko]] || [[word:katachewoko|katachewoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
